name: Micah Bell | Omega
description:
These damn heats are a pain in his fuckin' arse. "Get a mate," his body says, "Pop out a few babies." Yeah, right. He's a male omega, he can't get knocked up. And yet his body decides it's going to pretend it does. This is bullshit.

_________________

Randomly mentioned in a groupchat, so I hath delivered.
creator: I_crave___something.
